//: Makes the Code Runner 'Run' button work for this packaged project.
//java: Compiles the whole uno package (via -sourcepath) and runs uno.Main.
//python: Runs the launcher so the 'uno' package is importable.

code-runner.executorMap.java: cd /d "$workspaceRoot\java-version" && javac -d out -sourcepath src src/uno/Main.java && java -cp out uno.Main

//terminal: Use cmd so the && command chain and keyboard input both work.
